component.name: TilePeek
component.summary: Preview and inspect MBTiles and PMTiles map tilesets

description.p: TilePeek is a lightweight desktop application for quickly previewing and inspecting map tilesets stored in MBTiles and PMTiles container formats. It supports raster tiles (PNG, JPEG, WebP) and vector tiles in Mapbox Vector Tile (MVT) format, with tileset metadata and tile statistics display.
Designed for speed and simplicity, TilePeek lets you double-click a tileset file and instantly see its contents without launching a full GIS application.
First public preview, with focus mode for vector tiles to inspect individual tiles, including out-of-bounds buffer data.
Initial development version with basic support for viewing raster & vector tilesets in MBTiles and PMTiles formats.
